item.title: Version 0.1.4
item.description:
Version 0.1.4.
- Renames the app to Missing Toolkit while preserving stable signing for permissions and updates. - Adds an Accessibility-powered window switcher with slots 0–9, more reliable focus and cycling, and a shortcut to close the focused window. - Adds a shortcut to open screenshots directly in the annotation editor. - Adds an audio waveform to recording review and improves video transcription chunking and timeline mapping. - Adds local Nemotron voice dictation with live transcription and a streamlined audio preparation pipeline.
